Onboarding.welcomeBody: This is an interactive Ubuntu-style desktop portfolio. Let's take a quick look around — you can skip anytime.
Onboarding.dockBody: Click an icon here to open apps like Projects, Terminal, or Resume.
Onboarding.topbarBody: Check the time, status, and theme settings here.
Onboarding.shortcutsBody: Press Ctrl+K for the command palette. Drag a window to a screen edge to split it, or to the top to go fullscreen.
